messages.subject: [OGRUG] Note about Meetup msgs
messages.body_plain:
For some reason in the last few weeks Meetup announcements (I was
subscribed to the R Helpdesk meetup) showed up as blank messages. I
saved the message and pushed it through a file viewer and found it only
contained a base64 attachement, which returned "invalid input" on
attempts to decode. The output did show some typical HTML headers, like
the first 4-5 lines of a standard web page. I've unsubscribed from
Meetup for now, but wonder if others have experienced similar issues.

JN
